title: Ragawise
subtitle: Raga recognition & visualization
description: Real-time raga recognition from audio using pitch class profiles and machine learning. Identifies the raga being performed and visualizes melodic patterns live. Built at HAMR 2015 (Hacking Audio and Music Research).

title: Hindify
subtitle: Hindi music style transfer
description: Transforms Western pop songs into Hindustani classical style by applying raga-based melodic transformations. Converts Western scales to raga scales and applies ornaments characteristic of Indian classical music.

title: Sawaal-Jawaab
subtitle: Interactive Hindustani music game
description: A call-and-response musical game inspired by the Sawaal-Jawaab tradition in Indian classical music. Players sing or play a melodic phrase and the system responds with a melodic answer. Built at HAMR 2015.

title: Hodorizer
subtitle: Game of Thrones audio hack
description: Replaces all speech in any audio/video with Hodor's iconic single-word vocabulary, while preserving the original prosody, rhythm, and emotional tone of the speech using voice conversion techniques.

title: Music Spaghetti
subtitle: Infinite music loop generator
description: An Essentia-powered implementation of the Infinite Jukebox concept — analyzes a song's beat structure to find similar segments and creates an endlessly recombining loop that always sounds musical.

title: YIN.js
subtitle: Pitch detection in JavaScript
description: JavaScript implementation of the YIN pitch detection algorithm for real-time fundamental frequency estimation in the browser. Enables pitch tracking without any server-side processing.

title: Take-1
subtitle: Music practice tool
description: A practice companion for musicians that records and analyzes musical phrases, helping students compare their performances against reference recordings and track improvement over time.

title: Dunya
subtitle: CompMusic music corpus explorer
description: Web platform for exploring and analyzing the CompMusic music corpora — large collections of annotated audio recordings across Hindustani, Carnatic, Makam, Beijing opera, and Andalusian musical traditions.

title: Riyaz
subtitle: AI music practice app
description: AI-powered practice app for Indian classical music. Provides real-time feedback on pitch accuracy, tala (rhythm) adherence, and raga grammar. Co-founded MusicMuni Labs to build and commercialize this. 1M+ installs.
